summary.shape_sentence: Opening flush-and-reclaim trend day that converted into an upper-range hold after the noon peak.

goat.note: Opening flush reversed from roughly 24,914 and squeezed upward through multiple nearby supply markers, establishing the day's bullish control.

red_circles.behavior: Mostly marked local fade points and pullbacks within an overall bullish session, especially after the morning rally and during upper-range afternoon chop.

green_circles.behavior: Appeared on the opening reclaim and on repeated dip-buy defenses later in the day, showing higher-low support behavior.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply clustered near 25,095-25,115, 25,165-25,185, and 25,275-25,295; lower zones were broken after the reversal, while the top zone was later more respected than broken.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand clustered near 24,915-24,940 and again around 25,195-25,240; the opening extreme held and the low-25,200s shelf kept attracting buyers.

time_markers.10am_blue: At or just after the opening low/reversal zone; price was shifting from panic liquidation into strong reclaim.
time_markers.12pm_red: Near the strongest part of the session and close to the eventual high; momentum was still up but beginning to broaden into chop.
time_markers.2pm_green: Upper-range balance with demand continuing to hold; no major unwind of the morning advance.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed firm near 25,233, much closer to the high than the low, preserving the bullish session structure.

takeaway: Bullish flush-reversal trend day with a powerful opening reclaim, then a stable high-range hold; a useful comparable for sessions where early panic selling fails and demand takes control above reclaimed supply.
